sectionSubtitle: Six specialized AI tools — each purpose-built for a distinct creative workflow, each powered by Sacred Geometry mathematics and the Heady AI engine.

tools.name: HeadyCompose
tools.tagline: Generate complete musical ideas from a single prompt.
tools.description: HeadyCompose is HeadyMusic's flagship generative composition engine. Input a text prompt, a mood descriptor, a reference key and scale, or a seed chord progression — and HeadyCompose generates a full multi-part composition: melody, harmony, bass line, and rhythmic structure. All generated material uses φ-Harmonic scale intervals and Fibonacci-derived phrase lengths (8, 13, 21, 34 bars). Exports as MIDI, MusicXML, and audio render.

tools.name: HeadyMIDI
tools.tagline: Deep hardware control via SysEx and geometric MIDI patterns.
tools.description: HeadyMIDI is the most powerful MIDI controller in the Heady ecosystem — capable of standard MIDI CC messages and full SysEx (System Exclusive) parameter control for hardware synthesizers. Map φ-scaled geometric patterns to oscillator frequencies, filter envelopes, LFO depths, and effect parameters on any SysEx-capable device. Includes a growing library of SysEx profiles for Roland, Yamaha, Korg, Sequential, and Moog synthesizers.
tools.format: Standalone app + Max for Live device
keyFeatures: Hardware synth profile library (Roland, Yamaha, Korg, Sequential, Moog)
MIDI learn for any hardware parameter

tools.name: HeadyHarmony
tools.tagline: AI chord intelligence rooted in Sacred Geometry.
tools.description: HeadyHarmony analyzes an input melody or chord seed and generates harmonically rich chord progressions using φ-Harmonic voicing rules, neo-Riemannian transformations, and modal borrowing guided by Sacred Geometry interval ratios. Real-time chord suggestions appear as you play, with voice-leading optimization and tension/resolution curves derived from φ-scaled harmonic distance metrics.
keyFeatures: Real-time chord suggestion as you play
Modal borrowing with geometric interval rules

tools.name: HeadyRhythm
tools.tagline: Fibonacci beat generation for polyrhythmic perfection.
tools.description: HeadyRhythm generates rhythmic patterns using Fibonacci-sequence subdivisions (3, 5, 8, 13, 21 subdivisions per bar), Euclidean rhythm algorithms applied to φ-scaled step counts, and polyrhythmic combinations derived from Fibonacci number ratios. Generate drum patterns, percussion layers, and rhythmic counterpoint that sits in the pocket with mathematical precision and organic feel.
keyFeatures: Euclidean rhythm with φ-scaled step counts
Export as MIDI, Ableton drum rack, WAV

tools.name: HeadyStem
tools.tagline: Precision audio stem separation with AI.
tools.description: HeadyStem separates mixed audio recordings into isolated stems — vocals, drums, bass, melodic instruments, and ambience — using a deep learning source separation model trained on φ-Harmonic frequency band partitioning. Processing happens on HeadyCloud edge nodes for < 30 second turnaround on a 3-minute track. Stems export at 48kHz/32-bit float with optional phase-accurate re-pitch and time-stretch.

tools.name: HeadySync
tools.tagline: The bridge between HeadyMusic and your DAW.
tools.description: HeadySync is the universal DAW bridge that connects every HeadyMusic tool to your production environment. For Ableton Live, HeadySync provides Max for Live devices that receive MIDI clips directly from HeadyCompose and HeadyRhythm. For Logic Pro, it installs as a MIDI FX plugin. For FL Studio and Bitwig, it runs as a background MIDI routing service. All DAW bridges support Ableton Link for tempo sync.
tools.format: Platform-native plugin (Max for Live, MIDI FX, VST3, standalone service)
keyFeatures: Direct MIDI clip push to DAW tracks
